## Problem description

Describe the issue or misconfiguration this rule should detect.

## Example invalid config

Provide a minimal `webpack.config.js` excerpt or Module Federation configuration that should trigger the rule.

## Example valid config

Provide a minimal example that should not trigger the rule.

## Suggested message and fix

Write the expected issue message and a suggested fix.

## Why this rule belongs in mfe-doctor

Explain why this is a Module Federation config issue and not a broader architecture or runtime concern.
